Field Label:
Is this case eligible to be approached for full MITS (Specimen Collection)?

Case is eligible if meets all of the following criteria:

  • Deceased adult, aged 18 and above, including pregnant women
  • Died within 24 hours of eligibility screen
  • There are no legal regulations preventing data collection
  • The body is available for MITS

    • EXCLUSION CRITERIA:

  • Death due to injuries, including self-harm, such as suicide
  • Trauma-related deaths, including falls, drowning, road-traffic and other accidental deaths
  • Deaths due to natural disaster or conflict (fires, mudslides, gunshot wounds, explosives, torture, etc.)
  • Deaths where legal, traditional or cultural practices preclude enrollment (such as death of chief where traditional ceremonies may last up to three days before the body can be viewed/released)
Choices, Calculations, OR Slider Labels: CH00001, Yes | CH00002, No
